meta.title: Best Group Trip Planning Apps Compared (2026) — WePlanify
meta.description: Side-by-side comparison of the best group travel apps: Wanderlog, SquadTrip, TripIt, Stippl, Splitwise. Pick the right one for your next group adventure.

competitorDetails.name: Wanderlog
competitorDetails.text: Wanderlog is a map-based itinerary builder with route visualization. It lacks group polls, shared budget tracking, and French language support — features that are essential for group trip planning.

competitorDetails.name: SquadTrip
competitorDetails.text: SquadTrip handles group payments and RSVP management. It does not include packing lists, activity discovery, or French language support, so groups still need additional tools to plan the full trip.

competitorDetails.name: Troupe
competitorDetails.text: Troupe lets groups vote on activity suggestions. It covers only the decision phase — there is no budget tracking, no packing lists, and no French support, leaving most trip logistics unaddressed.

competitorDetails.name: TripIt
competitorDetails.text: TripIt assembles itineraries from forwarded booking emails. It is designed for solo travelers — group collaboration, polls, and shared budgets are not available, and most features require a paid Pro subscription.

competitorDetails.name: Splitwise
competitorDetails.text: Splitwise tracks shared expenses across a group. It has no trip planning features — no itinerary, no polls, no packing lists — so most groups need a second app alongside it. WePlanify includes built-in budget tracking along with every other planning tool.

competitorDetails.name: Stippl
competitorDetails.text: Stippl is a visual travel planner with community-shared itineraries and photo journals. It lacks group polls, shared budget tracking, and French language support — making it more suited for solo travelers than for coordinating a group trip.

heroTitle: Best Group Trip Planning Apps in 2026
heroIntro: Planning a trip with friends or family should be exciting, not stressful. We compared the most popular group travel apps so you can pick the right tool for your next adventure. Features, pricing, and everything you need to decide.
competitorsTitle: A Closer Look at Each App

whyPoints.title: All-in-one platform
whyPoints.desc: Itinerary, budget, polls, packing lists and activity discovery in a single app. No need to juggle three different tools.

whyPoints.title: Free forever
whyPoints.desc: Every core feature is free with no hidden paywalls or trial limits. Plan as many trips as you want.

whyPoints.title: Bilingual (EN / FR)
whyPoints.desc: Fully available in English and French — a rare find among travel planning apps.

whyPoints.title: Built for group decisions
whyPoints.desc: Polls, voting, and real-time collaboration ensure everyone has a say in the plan.
